articles.title: XRP ETF likely to launch after Bitcoin and Ether ETFs, says Ripple President
articles.description: Ripple President Monica Long anticipates a spot XRP exchange-traded fund will launch "very soon," likely the next major crypto ETF after those tied to Bitcoin and Ethereum."We will see various crypto ETFs this year coming out of the US. XRP is likely to be next in line after Bitcoin and ETH," Long said in an interview with Bloomberg Crypto this week.Bitwise, 21Shares, Canary Capital, and...

articles.title: Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin to list ‘imminently’ on more exchanges — Exec
articles.description: Ripple President Monica Long added that XRP will likely receive its spot ETF approval “very soon.”

articles.title: RLUSD Meets Chainlink: Will This Partnership Skyrocket Ripple’s Stablecoin?
articles.description: Ripple has partnered with Chainlink (LINK) to integrate RLUSD stablecoin pricing data on-chain. This collaboration aims to enhance the utility and adoption of Ripple’s USD-denominated stablecoin. By leveraging Chainlink’s robust infrastructure, Ripple hopes to solidify RLUSD’s position in decentralized finance (DeFi) markets. Ripple Boosts RLUSD Utility with Chainlink Integration Chainlink...

articles.title: How Hyperliquid’s insanely lucrative airdrop launch changed the game
articles.description: Hyperliquid airdropped 28% of its HYPE token supply to early users. The airdrop is now worth more than $7 billion, making it the most valuable in history.

articles.title: XRP Investors Cash Out $1.6 Billion Amid Market Stagnation
articles.description: XRP investors cash out $1.6 billion in profit-taking amid six weeks of stagnation, with long-term holders providing key support against further decline.
